predictions.caption: The image depicts a lioness attacking a llama in a mountainous landscape. The scene is dynamic and captures the action of the predator.

This is a photograph of a landscape featuring two distinct lakes or lagoons, one with a light green hue and the other with a blue hue, nestled amidst dark, rugged terrain under a dramatic, stormy sky.

This is a close-up photograph of a fish, likely an orange or reddish-brown species, partially submerged in dark blue water. The image features intricate details of the fish's scales, eyes, and mouth, highlighting the texture and coloration of the fish.

This is an aerial photograph of a vibrant autumn forest landscape featuring a river winding through it. The image highlights the dense foliage of trees in various shades of red, orange, yellow, and green, showcasing the changing seasons.
The image is a photograph of a woman in a white dress standing in a desert landscape with cacti and desert plants.

The image is a black and white photograph of a bride and groom walking outdoors at night. The bride is wearing a long white dress and veil, and the groom is dressed in a tuxedo. They are walking in front of a building with large windows.
The image depicts a young woman in a blue coat standing in a vibrant, nighttime cityscape with colorful neon signs and illuminated buildings.
The image depicts a wooden surface with visible wood grain, knots, and variations in color. It appears to be a rendered texture or background asset.

This is a black and white photograph of two rocky formations in the ocean, with a cross visible on one of them. The image captures the calm ocean surface and emphasizes the textures and contrasts of the rocks.

The image features the year 2026 prominently displayed in gold, stylized font against a dark blue background with gold confetti and streamers. The text "HAPPY NEW YEAR" is centered within the gold circle.
The image features two polar bears in an ice cave. The primary focus is on the adult bear and its cub, highlighting their white fur and resting position.
The image is a photograph of a fox in a snowy environment at night.

The image shows a woman using a camera with a large telephoto lens, positioned in front of a wooden structure, possibly a shed or window frame. She is wearing a knitted hat and holding the camera with both hands, focusing her attention on the viewfinder.
